evals.prompt: description, descriptionPDFdescription, description. description, description, description. descriptionWorddescription, description.
evals.expected_output: A complete Chinese patent package with stable source IDs, evidence ledger, claim-feature map, editable equations, a claim-aligned main flowchart, methodology figures, separate DOCX files, and passing validation reports.
An OCR-aware claim draft that marks uncertain source blocks, excludes unsupported limitations from formal claims, lists specific inventor questions, and does not fabricate equation symbols.
Separate source maps plus a bidirectional feature table using the declared relationship labels, exact locators for both documents, and no assumption that patent-only text is paper-supported.
